{{Infobox character
| name = Balari
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Balari]] is the [[Herald of the Silent Servants]] and a [[sword]] artist.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Balari]] is a person [[Kelsa]] knows.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Balari]] is the [[Silent Herald]] who appeared to assist [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
